requirement_topic.en: Cell / Pack Safety Listing — UL 1642, UL 2054, UL 2056 (NRTL)

summary.en: The United States has no single mandatory federal safety mark for lithium batteries or power banks equivalent to the EU CE mark. However, NRTL (Nationally Recognised Testing Laboratory) listing under UL standards is the de facto market requirement enforced by retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Home Depot), Authorities Having Jurisdiction (AHJs), and insurance underwriters. The applicable standards are: UL 1642 (Lithium Batteries — cells), UL 2054 (Household and Commercial Batteries — packs), and UL 2056 (Power Banks). Products not bearing an NRTL mark are routinely refused by US retailers, rejected at customs by CBP, or flagged under CPSC enforcement. OSHA recognises 18 NRTLs including UL, Intertek (ETL), CSA, MET, and TÜV SÜD.
summary.zh: 美国没有与欧盟CE标志对等的锂电池或移动电源单一联邦强制安全标志。但是，UL标准下的NRTL（国家认可检测实验室）认证是零售商（亚马逊、沃尔玛、家得宝）、有关当局（AHJ）及保险承销商的市场准入实际要求。适用标准为：UL 1642（锂电池——电芯）、UL 2054（家用及商用电池——电池包）及UL 2056（移动电源）。未获NRTL标志的产品通常被美国零售商拒绝、被CBP海关扣押，或受CPSC执法处理。OSHA认可18家NRTL，包括UL、Intertek（ETL）、CSA、MET及TÜV SÜD。
summary.zht: 美國沒有與歐盟CE標誌對等的鋰電池或行動電源單一聯邦強制安全標誌。但是，UL標準下的NRTL（國家認可檢測實驗室）認證是零售商（亞馬遜、沃爾瑪、家得寶）、有關當局（AHJ）及保險承銷商的市場準入實際要求。適用標準為：UL 1642（鋰電池——電芯）、UL 2054（家用及商用電池——電池包）及UL 2056（行動電源）。未獲NRTL標誌的產品通常被美國零售商拒絕、被CBP海關扣押，或受CPSC執法處理。OSHA認可18家NRTL，包括UL、Intertek（ETL）、CSA、MET及TÜV SÜD。

standards_or_laws: UL 2054 — Standard for Household and Commercial Batteries (packs)
UL 62133-2 — Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications (IEC 62133-2 equivalent, used by some NRTLs)

summary.en: China's domestic equivalents include: GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment — revised 2022, mandatory for the domestic market under CCC or CQC), GB 18287-2017 (General specification for lithium-ion battery for cellular phones), and IEC 62133-2:2017 adopted as GB/T 36972-2018 for secondary lithium cells. CCC certification under GB 31241 is mandatory for consumer lithium battery products sold in China. These certifications are not recognised as equivalent to NRTL listing under UL standards for the US market.
summary.zh: 中国国内对应标准包括：GB 31241-2022（便携式电子产品用锂离子电池和电池组安全要求——2022年修订版，消费类产品须通过CCC或CQC强制认证）、GB 18287-2017（蜂窝电话用锂离子电池总规范）及采用IEC 62133-2:2017的GB/T 36972-2018（便携式电器用二次锂电池）。在华销售的消费类锂电池产品须依据GB 31241取得CCC认证。上述认证不被视为等同于美国市场UL标准下的NRTL认证。
summary.zht: 中國國內對應標準包括：GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子產品用鋰離子電池和電池組安全要求——2022年修訂版，消費類產品須通過CCC或CQC強制認證）、GB 18287-2017（蜂窩電話用鋰離子電池總規範）及採用IEC 62133-2:2017的GB/T 36972-2018（便攜式電器用二次鋰電池）。在華銷售的消費類鋰電池產品須依據GB 31241取得CCC認證。上述認證不被視為等同於美國市場UL標準下的NRTL認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for lithium-ion cells and batteries used in portable electronic equipment (mandatory CCC/CQC)
GB 18287-2017 — General specification for lithium-ion battery for cellular phones
GB/T 36972-2018 — Secondary lithium cells and batteries for portable applications (adopts IEC 62133-2:2017)

gap.en: The core gap is the absence of a single US federal mandatory mark: unlike CE marking, no US law requires UL listing, yet market access without NRTL listing is practically impossible. Chinese GB 31241 / CCC certification does not substitute for UL 1642, UL 2054, or UL 2056 NRTL listing. Products must be independently submitted to an NRTL and tested to the relevant UL standard. Test scope differences between GB 31241-2022 and UL 2054/2056 include: cell-level abuse tests (nail penetration, crush), overcharge/overdischarge protocols, short-circuit current limits, and label/warning marking requirements. Additional gap: UL 2056 (power banks) specifically addresses reverse-charging, passthrough charging, and battery management IC failure modes not covered by GB 31241.
gap.zh: 核心差距在于美国没有单一联邦强制标志：与CE标志不同，美国法律不强制要求UL认证，但实际上未获NRTL认证的产品无法进入市场。中国GB 31241 / CCC认证不能替代UL 1642、UL 2054或UL 2056的NRTL认证。产品须独立向NRTL提交申请并依据相关UL标准完成检测。GB 31241-2022与UL 2054/2056之间的检测范围差异包括：电芯级滥用测试（针刺、挤压）、过充/过放协议、短路电流限值及标签/警告标识要求。额外差距：UL 2056（移动电源）专门涵盖反向充电、直通充电及电池管理IC故障模式，而GB 31241未涉及这些内容。
gap.zht: 核心差距在於美國沒有單一聯邦強制標誌：與CE標誌不同，美國法律不強制要求UL認證，但實際上未獲NRTL認證的產品無法進入市場。中國GB 31241 / CCC認證不能替代UL 1642、UL 2054或UL 2056的NRTL認證。產品須獨立向NRTL提交申請並依據相關UL標準完成檢測。GB 31241-2022與UL 2054/2056之間的檢測範圍差異包括：電芯級濫用測試（針刺、擠壓）、過充/過放協議、短路電流限值及標籤/警告標識要求。額外差距：UL 2056（行動電源）專門涵蓋反向充電、直通充電及電池管理IC故障模式，而GB 31241未涉及這些內容。

mandatory_status.target: De facto mandatory — no single US federal law mandates UL listing, but NRTL listing under UL 1642 / UL 2054 / UL 2056 is required by major retailers, AHJs, and CBP enforcement practice; CPSC has authority to mandate under 15 U.S.C. § 2064
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 31241-2022 under CCC/CQC scheme for consumer lithium battery products sold in China (enforced by SAMR)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no single mandatory federal safety mark for lithium batteries in the US. However, NRTL listing under UL 1642 (cells), UL 2054 (packs), or UL 2056 (power banks) is the de facto requirement for US retail and AHJ acceptance. Chinese CCC/GB 31241 certification does not satisfy this requirement. Independent NRTL testing is required; Chinese test reports to GB standards are not accepted as equivalent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】美国没有针对锂电池的单一联邦强制安全标志。但UL 1642（电芯）、UL 2054（电池包）或UL 2056（移动电源）的NRTL认证是美国零售商及有关当局准入的实际要求。中国CCC/GB 31241认证不满足该要求，须独立完成NRTL检测；依据GB标准出具的中国检测报告不被接受为等同依据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】美國沒有針對鋰電池的單一聯邦強制安全標誌。但UL 1642（電芯）、UL 2054（電池包）或UL 2056（行動電源）的NRTL認證是美國零售商及有關當局準入的實際要求。中國CCC/GB 31241認證不滿足該要求，須獨立完成NRTL檢測；依據GB標準出具的中國檢測報告不被接受為等同依據。
